name: site-localspace-semantics
description: Measures semantic coherence of localspace name sets generated by the LS-FILL pipeline. Each run starts the player inside a site (depth 2) using a themed world prompt, then GETs /diagnostics/sites to read active_site. Deterministic metrics: ls_fill_rate (all spaces named?), ls_unique_name_rate (no exact duplicates?), localspace_count, ls_size_spread, ls_mean_size. row_extract captures the full local_spaces array for post-run Mother Brain semantic review (synonym clusters, role repetition, genre leakage, container logic).
